description: Runtime agent context for D-Comp Orchestrator agents. Paths are relative to the decomp-orchestrator repo root. Colosseum knowledge source definitions, APIs, data, indexes, and graph resources live under projects/pkmn-colosseum/knowledge; reusable GameCube tool definitions live under toolpacks/gamecube-decomp; project tool bindings/data live under projects/pkmn-colosseum; role behavior lives beside the server agents package.

rank_decomp_candidates.purpose: Rank fuzzy functions and linked blocker units from build/GC6E01/report.json.

decomp_context_lookup.purpose: Search local code, report metadata, and active project resources for one target.

scaffold_decomp_run.purpose: Create a reproducible decomp-runs/<slug> experimental search bundle.

summarize_objdiff_json.purpose: Summarize objdiff JSON for experimental search result rows.

render_progress_charts.purpose: Render experimental search progress, Pareto, and mismatch SVG charts.
